query:
INSERT INTO access_requests (name, email, phone, about)
         VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
         ON CONFLICT (lower(email)) DO UPDATE
         SET name = excluded.name,
             phone = coalesce(excluded.phone, access_requests.phone),
             about = excluded.about,
             created_at = now(),
             handled_at = NULL,
             handled_by = NULL
